item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "diff -u \\
  --label a/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json \\
  --label b/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json \\
  <(sed 's/\"mode\": \"streaming\"/\"mode\": \"batch\"/' longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json) \\
  longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json || true
diff -u \\
  --label a/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md \\
  --label b/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md \\
  <(sed -e 's/streaming mode/batch mode/' -e 's/--mode streaming/--mode batch/' longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md) \\
  longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md || true"

item.aggregated_output:
--- a/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json
+++ b/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "schema_version": 2,
-  "mode": "batch",
+  "mode": "streaming",
   "max_parallel": 3,
   "owner": "operations",
   "queues": [
--- a/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md
+++ b/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md
@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
 # Onboarding
 
-Run onboarding in batch mode for the operations owner, processing the `new` queue before `retry` with up to three jobs in parallel:
+Run onboarding in streaming mode for the operations owner, processing the `new` queue before `retry` with up to three jobs in parallel:
 
 ```sh
 onboarding run \
   --config config/onboarding.json \
-  --mode batch \
+  --mode streaming \
   --max-parallel 3 \
   --owner operations \
   --queue new \
